items.title: Floods and landslides in Brazil kill at least 20
items.dek: Hundreds of people have been displaced and dozens are missing, with rescue operations still ongoing in Juiz de Fora.
items.body: Hundreds of people have been displaced and dozens are missing, with rescue operations still ongoing in Juiz de Fora.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Two dead after winter storm hammers the US northeast
items.dek: Two people died when a tree fell on their car during a historic winter storm that has also delayed flights and left thousands without power.
items.body: Two people died when a tree fell on their car during a historic winter storm that has also delayed flights and left thousands without power.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offers $1m reward to bring home missing mother
items.dek: Fighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter says they accept she may be dead.
items.body: Fighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter says they accept she may be dead.
items.author: IriLine Desk
